/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/client.dir/client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/ChatClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/gui/LoginWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/gui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/client/gui/AboutWindow.cpp.o -o client  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
